## Description

**Gyeon Q²M Interior Detailer** is the ideal maintenance product for your car's interior. It removes light dirt and contaminants, leaving a fresh and clean interior feel. Gyeon Interior Detailer is safe for leather, plastic, Alcantara, fabric, glass, and all other types of interior upholstery. It provides a matte and non-sticky finish.

Q²M Interior Detailer features an alcohol-based formula (60%) that removes most organic contaminants from any surface. This ensures that you keep your interior bacteria-free, which is also better for the health of you and your family. Q²M Interior Detailer does not replace Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M LeatherCleaner but complements them.

*Available in 500ml, 1000ml, and 4000ml*

## Specifications

| Product number:
| 8809432676515

- Contents: 500ml, 1000ml, or 4000ml

- Alcohol-based formula (60%)

## Hazard Information

H226: Flammable liquid and vapour. 

H319: Causes serious eye irritation.

## Manual

- If in doubt, always test on an inconspicuous area first.

- Gyeon Interior Detailer can be used on any hard surface.

- Spray the product onto a microfiber cloth and treat the surface.

Matte finish, bacteria-free convenience, and suitable for every surface

The perfect interior detailer

All-rounder in a bottle

## Suitable for every interior

The Gyeon Q²M InteriorDetailer is the ultimate solution for a quick and effective interior refresh. Thanks to its versatile formula, this detailer is suitable for almost all interior materials, such as plastic, leather, vinyl, and Alcantara. Whether you want to clean your dashboard, door panels, or center console, this spray makes it effortless without leaving any residue. With just a simple spray and wipe, your interior looks like new again—without needing multiple products.

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/28/ac/76/1741345624/InteriorDetailer.png?ts=1741345624)

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/c5/75/be/1741345637/InteriorDetailer3.png?ts=1741345637)

Matte is the new shine

## A streak-free, dry finish

Nothing is more annoying than an interior cleaner that leaves a sticky or glossy layer behind. Fortunately, the Gyeon Q²M InteriorDetailer provides a completely matte and dry finish, ensuring your interior looks sleek and well-maintained. No greasy residue on your dashboard or reflective surfaces in the sun—just a natural look as it should be. Plus, the surface feels clean and dust-free, without dust particles quickly settling again.

Bye bye, bacteria

## Hygiene at its best

In addition to removing dust and stains, the Gyeon Q²M InteriorDetailer also has a disinfecting effect. The formula eliminates bacteria and germs, ensuring your interior not only looks fresh but is truly clean. This makes the product ideal for families, taxi drivers, and anyone who values a hygienic car interior. With just one quick cleaning session, you give bacteria no chance—without using harsh chemicals that could damage your interior.

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/22/fd/69/1741345677/InteriorDetialer3.png?ts=1741345677)

Shared on the socials.
